text:
The Hunter × Hunter Funko POP! products belong to the Pop! Animation line of Funko products.

Overview

The brand typically uses the animation category of vinyl figurines to categorize anime, manga, and cartoon lines. Some Hunter × Hunter products also belong to the Pop! Deluxe, Pop! Keychain, and Pop! Pins subcategories of products.

Viz Media announced in 2018 that Funko had obtained the license to Hunter × Hunter and the first wave of Hunter x Hunter Funko POP! Animation products rolled out in 2020. https://web.archive.org/web/20201107234925/https://www.viz.com/news/newsroom/v/1006665 

Waves

The Funko POP! Animation Hunter × Hunter POPs are not officially divided into specific "waves" or sets. Rather, waves here are divided by what is most commonly used for grouping certain POPs together either in the Funko fandom or by which POPs get released simultaneously. This means waves are mostly differentiated by the dates on which products are released and partially by which "group" in Hunter × Hunter a character belongs.
